description_long: This sculpture is a bust of a human head, modeled in a rough, expressive style with visible tool marks and an unfinished texture. The head features prominent facial details such as a defined nose, lips, and deep-set eyes, with stylized hair swept to one side. The bust is mounted on a simple, rectangular wooden base that contrasts with the reddish-brown color of the sculpted head. The back of the head is less detailed, with a more abstract, blocky treatment of the hair and skull. The overall form is solid and compact, with a lifelike yet impressionistic representation of the human figure. The sculpture's surface is matte and coarse, emphasizing the hand-crafted, artistic quality of the piece.
description: A rough-textured, reddish-brown bust of a human head with stylized features, mounted on a rectangular wooden base. The sculpture has expressive facial details and a matte, unfinished surface.
description_view_0: Left profile view showing the prominent nose, lips, and stylized hair, with the wooden base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the abstract, blocky treatment of the hair and the back of the head, with minimal facial detail.
description_view_2: Right profile view displaying the defined facial features and the textured surface of the hair and face.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the deep-set eyes, nose, and mouth, with the head slightly tilted downward and the base fully visible.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
